name: Debug Skill Seed Protocol (P0)
description: The initial protocol derived by structuring the hand-written debug_protocol.md into machine-readable (signature, cause, fix) entries. Analogous to Template Skill's meta-template M0.

entryCategories.proactive: Pre-execution validations — checks run BEFORE build/test/dev to catch known inconsistency classes early.
entryCategories.reactive: Diagnosis entries — matched AFTER a failure occurs to provide root cause and verified fix.

evolutionPoints: New failure patterns encountered during debug sessions are appended as reactive entries.
Repeated patterns (>= GENERALIZATION_THRESHOLD occurrences) are generalized into ProtocolRules.
Proactive entries can be promoted to ProtocolRules with automated validation checks.
